questions.question: Explain the key differences between the Custer model and the Fuzzy model in the context of information retrieval. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on key features and benefits

questions.question: What are the major advantages and disadvantages of using an LSTM (Long Short-Term Memory) model for information retrieval tasks? (10 marks)

questions.hint: Choose a common issue and provide a relevant example
